postProcess: Copied generated sheets into outputs and padded canvases only; no scaling or shrinking was applied.

cards.name: Borrowed Crown
cards.effect: Take control of one enemy piece for 1 turn. If it survives, it returns to its owner.

cards.name: Blink
cards.effect: Teleport one of your pieces to an empty square.

cards.name: Royal Shield
cards.effect: Choose one of your pieces. It cannot be captured until your next turn.

cards.name: Time Rewind
cards.effect: Move the last moved piece back to its previous square if that square is empty.

cards.name: Pawn Uprising
cards.effect: One pawn you control becomes a queen for 1 turn, then reverts if still on the board.

cards.name: Frozen Square
cards.effect: Freeze one enemy piece. It cannot move on its controller's next turn.

cards.name: Swap Places
cards.effect: Swap the positions of two allied pieces.

cards.name: Mirror Move
cards.effect: Copy the opponent's last normal move with one of your pieces, if the copied move is legal.

cards.name: Phantom Decoy
cards.effect: Create a decoy pawn on an empty square. It blocks movement, cannot capture, and disappears at the start of your next turn.

cards.name: Diagonal Strike
cards.effect: Choose one bishop or queen you control. Destroy the first enemy piece on one diagonal from it.

cards.name: Knight's Leap
cards.effect: Choose one of your pieces. This turn, it may move like a knight once.

cards.name: Anywhere Castle
cards.effect: Castle with your king and one rook if both pieces are still on the board and neither is currently threatened.

cards.name: Sacrifice Pact
cards.effect: Destroy one of your pieces to destroy one adjacent enemy piece.

cards.name: Check Breaker
cards.effect: Cancel check once this turn. The king must still make a legal move before the turn ends.
